titles.title: Isn't the Love of Jesus Something Wonderful

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There will never be a sweeter story, Story of the Savior's Love Divine, Love that brought Him from the realms of glory, Just to save a sinful soul like mine.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Isn't the love of Jesus something wonderful? Wonderful, wonderful! Oh, isn't the love of Jesus something wonderful? Wonderful it is to me!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Boundless as the universe around me, Reaching to the farthest soul away, Saving keeping love it was that found me, That is why my heart can truly say.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Love beyond our human comprehending Love of God in Christ, how can it be? This will be my theme and never ending, Great redeeming love of Calvary.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Isn't the love of Jesus something wonderful? (Oh, how marvelous, oh, how wonderful) Wonderful, wonderful (my soul shall never fear) Oh, isn't the love of Jesus something wonderful? (Oh, how marvelous, oh, how wonderful) Wonderful it is to me.
